docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD AND JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER DUNN, JANIE

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PETITIONER DUNN, JANIE

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER JANIE DUNN'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 21, 2011 FOR THE MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH ENDORSED FILED COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOVING PAPERS IN CONFORMITY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(B) NO LATER THAN JANUARY 18, 2011. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-13-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-21-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER JANIE DUNN'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: RHONDA L. AQUILINA, CSR # 9956 301/PJB
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PETITIONER DUNN, JANIE
